ns0:entry.ns0:title: RhysSullivan/executor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/RhysSullivan/executor
Language: typescript
The missing integration layer for AI agents. Let them call any OpenAPI / MCP / GraphQL / custom js functions in secure environment.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YishenTu/claudian
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YishenTu/claudian
Language: typescript
An Obsidian plugin that embeds Claude Code as an AI collaborator in your vault

ns0:entry.ns0:title: campfirein/byterover-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/campfirein/byterover-cli
Language: typescript
ByteRover CLI (brv) - The portable memory layer for autonomous coding agents (formerly Cipher)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coleam00/Archon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coleam00/Archon
Language: typescript
The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hicccc77/WeFlow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hicccc77/WeFlow
Language: typescript
WeFlow - 一个本地的微信聊天记录导出和年度报告应用

ns0:entry.ns0:title: multica-ai/multica
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/multica-ai/multica
Language: typescript
The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: open-metadata/OpenMetadata
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/open-metadata/OpenMetadata
Language: typescript
OpenMetadata is a unified metadata platform for data discovery, data observability, and data governance powered by a central metadata repository, in-depth column level lineage, and seamless team collaboration.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/siddharthvaddem/openscreen
Language: typescript
Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: typescript
A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tobi/qmd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tobi/qmd
Language: typescript
mini cli search engine for your docs, knowledge bases, meeting notes, whatever. Tracking current sota approaches while being all local
